response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and impressive career breadth, this role requires a fundamentally different skill set. The candidate lacks the critical required qualification of native-level Japanese language proficiency, has minimal and outdated C programming experience (last used 10+ years ago), and has zero domain expertise in embedded networking, security protocols, kernel development, or switch firmware. The entire career trajectory shows web/mobile/desktop specialization, making this a poor fit regardless of general engineering ability.
strengths: Demonstrates exceptional software craftsmanship with proven expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and clean code practices
Shows ability to learn diverse programming languages (D, Java, C++, JavaScript) and work across full stack
Has experienced collaborating across teams and mentoring others through workshops and courses
concerns: Missing mandatory requirement: zero evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required
Minimal C programming experience limited to single role 10+ years ago; current skillset heavily weighted toward JavaScript/TypeScript unsuitable for embedded firmware
No domain expertise in networking, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), kernel development, or embedded systems; entire career is web/mobile/desktop focused
